prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading for sustained endurance energy

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories with carbohydrates comprising 55-65% of total calories
Includes 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day for sustained energy
Features easily digestible, carbohydrate-rich foods suitable for endurance athletes
task_description: Write a compact ,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and sustained energy

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle gain and strength improvement with recovery optimization

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals and includes 2-3 snacks distributed throughout the day
Total daily protein meets or exceeds 135g (1.5g per kg bodyweight)
Macronutrient distribution supports strength training with balanced carbohydrates and healthy fats
Includes specific meal timing recommendations around workout for recovery
task_description: Write a compact ,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with a strength-based athlete (weightlifter) requiring balanced macros with high protein intake (1.5g+ per lb bodyweight) and recovery nutrition

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain muscle mass while cutting weight for competition (target: under 2000 calories/day)

solution_criteria: Total daily calories do not exceed 2000 kcal
Protein content supports muscle maintenance (minimum 1.6g per kg body weight)
Meal plan is compact and covers all three meals with timing suitable for training
All meals comply with dairy-free restriction
task_description: Write a compact ,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with a weight-conscious athlete (boxer/wrestler) requiring calorie-controlled meals under 2000 calories while maintaining muscle mass and performance nutrients
